Street Fence.name: Street Fence
Street Fence.description: An expert can find the treasure amid the trash you loot from your poorer victims.
Street Fence.effect: You get +2 coin in your payoff for scores that involve lower-class targets

Ancient Tower.name: Ancient Tower
Ancient Tower.description: This tower was prepared by sorcery from the pre-cataclysm and acts as an arcane lens to focus eldritch energy across the black mirror into the void.
Ancient Tower.effect: You get +1d to Consort with arcane entities on-site

Covert Drop.name: Covert Drop
Covert Drop.description: The perfect hidden exchange point is worth the extra coin to discerning clientele.
Covert Drop.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve espionage or sabotage

Bluecoat Confederates.name: Bluecoat Confederates
Bluecoat Confederates.description: The street patrol around here helps you out now.
Bluecoat Confederates.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for assault plans

Informants.name: Informants
Informants.description: Your eyes and ears on the streets are always on the lookout for new targets or clients.
Informants.effect: You get +1d to gather information for a score

Sacred Nexus.name: Sacred Nexus
Sacred Nexus.description: Ancient arcane energy seeps into the wounded here, speeding their recovery, and marking them consecrated by its power.
Sacred Nexus.effect: You get +1d to healing treatment rolls

Training Rooms.name: Training Rooms
Training Rooms.description: Extra training enables them to fight like a larger gang.

Secret Routes.name: Secret Routes
Secret Routes.description: You might have access to long-forgotten underground canals, dark streets normally hidden behind debris, or some other route of your choosing.
Secret Routes.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for transport plans

Parole Influence.name: Parole Influence
Parole Influence.description: Political pressures of various sorts can be applied to the magistrates and warden who oversee sentences for crimes. With this claim, you’re always able to arrange for a shorter prison stay—as if your wanted level was 1 lower. So, if your wanted level was 3 when you went in, you’d spend only several months behind bars (equivalent to level 2) instead of a full year.
Parole Influence.effect: You’re always able to arrange for a shorter prison stay—as if your wanted level was 1 lower.

Spirit Well.name: Spirit Well
Spirit Well.description: A spirit well draws ghosts and other things to its power, which you harness to aid your arts.
Spirit Well.effect: You get +1d to Attune rolls on-site

Offertory.name: Offertory
Offertory.description: The frightened locals offer you tribute when you perform your dark practices. They don’t want to be next.
Offertory.effect: You get +2 coin in your payoff for scores that involve occult operations

Protection Racket.name: Protection Racket
Protection Racket.description: Some of the locals are terrified of you and will gladly pay for “protection.”
Protection Racket.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Local Graft.name: Local Graft
Local Graft.description: A few city officials share bribe money with those who show that they’re players on the scene.
Local Graft.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve a show of force or socializing

Luxury Venue.name: Luxury Venue
Luxury Venue.description: Silks, paintings, and crystal impress the clientele.
Luxury Venue.effect: +1d to Consort and Sway rolls on-site

Tavern.name: Tavern
Tavern.description: Some booze and friendly conversation can go a long way.
Tavern.effect: You get +1d to Consort and Sway rolls on-site

Interrogation Chamber.name: Interrogation Chamber
Interrogation Chamber.effect: You get +1d to Command and Sway on-site

Hagfish Farm.name: Hagfish Farm
Hagfish Farm.effect: When you use the reduce heat downtime activity after a score that involves killing, you get +1d to the roll and quiet, convenient disposal of any corpses you left on the job

Victim Trophies.name: Victim Trophies
Victim Trophies.description: Word of your grisly “collection” gets around, and your boldness boosts your rep in the underworld.

Drug Den.name: Drug Den
Drug Den.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Warehouses.name: Warehouses
Warehouses.description: You have space to hold all the various items and supplies you end up with from your smuggling runs. They can be useful on their own or for barter when you need it.
Warehouses.effect: You get +1d to acquire asset rolls

Secret Pathways.name: Secret Pathways
Secret Pathways.description: You might have access to long-forgotten underground canals, rooftop walkways, or some other route of your choosing.
Secret Pathways.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for stealth plans

Ancient Altar.name: Ancient Altar
Ancient Altar.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for occult plans

Vice Den.name: Vice Den
Vice Den.description:
Is this claim a den you’ve overtaken from another purveyor, or a new establishment replacing something else?

Perhaps you sell some of the contraband you smuggle here? Or do you not mix your operations?
Vice Den.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Cover Identities.name: Cover Identities
Cover Identities.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for deception and social plans

Surplus Cache.name: Surplus Cache
Surplus Cache.description: You have an abundance of product, which pads your pockets every now and then.
Surplus Cache.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve product sale or supply

Guard Payoff.name: Guard Payoff
Guard Payoff.description: You claim several Ironhook prison guards on your payroll. Take +1d to your Tier roll when a member of your crew is incarcerated.
Guard Payoff.effect: Take +1d to your Tier roll when a member of your crew is incarcerated.

Gambling Den.name: Gambling Den
Gambling Den.description: Cards, dice, or something more unusual on offer?
Gambling Den.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description: Your sanctuary maintains its effect as long as your deity is well-pleased with your service.
Sanctuary.effect: +1d to Command and Sway rolls on-site

Cell Block Control.name: Cell Block Control
Cell Block Control.description: Your crew has a cell block under their total control—guards and all. You never take trauma from incarceration.
Cell Block Control.effect: You never take trauma from incarceration.

Fighting Pits.name: Fighting Pits
Fighting Pits.description: The locals love to gamble away their hard-won coin on the blood-sports you host.
Fighting Pits.effect: During downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Cover Operation.name: Cover Operation
Cover Operation.description: The cover of a legitimate operation helps deflect some of the heat from law enforcement.

Envoy.name: Envoy
Envoy.description: This well-connected liaison will help arrange for a better payoff from rich clients.
Envoy.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve high-class clients

Foreign Market.name: Foreign Market
Foreign Market.description: Some of your product makes its way out of the city.
Foreign Market.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

Lookouts.name: Lookouts
Lookouts.effect: You get +1d to Hunt or Survey on your turf

Cloister.name: Cloister
Cloister.description: More room for hopeful novices desperate to pledge their service.

Luxury Fence.name: Luxury Fence
Luxury Fence.description: It requires a skilled eye and good contacts to move hot luxury goods.
Luxury Fence.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve high-class targets

Loyal Fence.name: Loyal Fence
Loyal Fence.description: It requires a skilled eye and good contacts to move stolen goods.
Loyal Fence.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve burglary or robbery

Side Business.name: Side Business
Side Business.description: What kind of legitimate business is this? How do you get paid in secret?
Side Business.effect: Any time during downtime, roll dice equal to your Tier. You earn coin equal to the highest result, minus your heat

City Records.name: City Records
City Records.description: You can use blueprints and other documents to determine a good approach for infiltrations.
City Records.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for stealth plans

Bluecoat Intimidation.name: Bluecoat Intimidation
Bluecoat Intimidation.description: The law doesn’t want any trouble from you; they look the other way.

Hardcase.name: Hardcase
Hardcase.description: Your reputation as a tough inmate bolsters your crew’s image in Duskwall. When your crew advances Tier, it costs 2 fewer coins than it normally would.
Hardcase.effect: When your crew advances Tier, it costs 2 fewer coins than it normally would.

Ancient Obelisk.name: Ancient Obelisk
Ancient Obelisk.description: This effect applies to all cultists, everywhere – so long as the deity is well-pleased. You don’t have to be on-site at the obelisk to benefit from its power.
Ancient Obelisk.effect: -1 stress cost for all arcane powers and rituals

Fleet.name: Fleet
Fleet.description: Each cohort has a common vehicle, with quality equal to your Tier
Fleet.effect: Your cohorts have their own vehicles

Smuggling.name: Smuggling
Smuggling.description: You arrange smuggling channels inside. You have +2 load while incarcerated, (starting from zero as a prisoner). If you take this claim twice, you’ll have 4 load while you’re serving time in Ironhook. Also, you may choose to carry coin in place of load for purposes of bribes or acquiring assets while in prison. You may reset the items in your prison loadout whenever your crew has downtime.

Fixer.name: Fixer
Fixer.description: This well-respected agent will help arrange for a better payoff from poorer clients.
Fixer.effect: You get +2 coin in payoff for scores that involve lower-class clients

Personal Clothier.name: Personal Clothier
Personal Clothier.description: You always arrive on the scene in the most current and alluring fashion.
Personal Clothier.effect: You get +1d to the engagement roll for social plans

Ancient Gate.name: Ancient Gate
Ancient Gate.description: When you leave the city through this gate, the spirits of the deathlands will not molest you unless directly provoked.

Allied Claim.name: Allied Claim
Allied Claim.description: One of your allies on the inside arranges for their faction to grant you a boon. Take a claim for your crew from a different crew type. You can’t take turf with this claim.
Allied Claim.effect: Take a claim for your crew from a different crew type.

Infirmary.name: Infirmary
Infirmary.description: The infirmary also has beds for long-term convalescence.
Infirmary.effect: You get +1d to healing treatment rolls

Terrorized Citizens.name: Terrorized Citizens
Terrorized Citizens.description: The frightened locals offer you tribute whenever you lash out. They don’t want to be next.
Terrorized Citizens.effect: You get +2 coin in your payoff for scores that involve battle or extortion
